Mental Triggers
Mental triggers are the corner stone of how we conduct launches.
Module 2: Mental Triggers

Stories
▪ 	We've been trained for thousands of years to listen to stories
▪ 	Nothing is more engaging than a good story
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 22 --

Events
▪ 	People love events and feeling like they are part of something larger
than themselves
▪ 	Going through an event TOGETHER with other people is the core
piece of "ritual"...
▪ 	…and rituals are among the most powerful experiences that humans
have
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 22 --

Community
▪ 	We act like we think people in our community are supposed to act
▪ 	"Virtual" communities are REALLY strong
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 22 --

Social Proof
▪ 	People look to other people for clues on how to act
▪ 	If you can show your prospects that they are not alone, then you win
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 22 --

Scarcity
▪ 	When there is less of something, people will inherently want it more
▪ 	Event-based launches naturally lend themselves to some elements of
scarcity
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 22 --

Authority
▪ 	People will follow authority or authority figures
▪ 	You can establish huge authority in your Prelaunch
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 22 --

Anticipation
▪ 	Few things capture our attention and imagination more than
anticipation
▪ 	This is how people get pulled into your launch... it's what keeps people
reading and watching your marketing instead of your competitors
marketing
Module 2: Mental Triggers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 22 --

Common Enemy

Proof

Controversy

Interaction / Conversation

▪ 	People will pay attention to a conversation longer than a lecture
